# Midwess - Software Development Studio

Midwess is a software development studio building high-performance, secure software that empowers teams to innovate without friction.

## Products

### Bytover
High-speed, secure file sharing and localized data intelligence for the next generation of engineers. Skip the cloud. Stream entire folders instantly via ultra-fast P2P.

## Services

- Software development
- Web application development
- Technical consulting

## Pages

- / - Home
- /about - About Us
- /contact - Contact
- /faq - Frequently Asked Questions
- /pricing - Pricing
- /privacy - Privacy Policy
- /products/bytover - Bytover Product

## Blog

Technical articles about software development, programming, and technology.

## Technology Stack

- Next.js
- React
- TypeScript
- TailwindCSS
- Shadcn/UI
